name: The Business Consultant
effect: Deliver a bespoke strategic assessment. This card is considered objective.

clauses.name: MIRROR CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card is played after a stakeholder interview: The findings reflect what stakeholders already believed.

clauses.name: FRAMEWORK EFFECT
clauses.rule: When a recommendation is made: It is housed inside a proprietary two-by-two matrix.

clauses.name: DEPARTURE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When this card leaves the field: All institutional knowledge it carried leaves with it.

witness_quote: They said what we told them.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Who briefed them before the readout?
